subsection.heading: Plan.—
subsection.chapeau: In consultation with the States on the main line of the Northeast Corridor, the Secretary of Transportation shall develop a plan not later than September 30, 1993, to eliminate all highway at-grade crossings of the main line by not later than December 31, 1997. The plan may provide that eliminating a crossing is not required if—

paragraph.content: using the crossing is consistent with conditions the Secretary considers appropriate to ensure safety.

subsection.heading: Amtrak’s Share of Costs.—
subsection.content: Amtrak shall pay 20 percent of the cost of eliminating each highway at-grade crossing under the plan.
